caption: A screen recording shows a user navigating a web browser. Initially, the view focuses on a list of names generated by RANDOM.ORG, with "1. Ryan Prescott" and "2. Carl Hagenborn" at the top. A chat window on the right features messages from "glowbog27" saying "turning" and "Nightbot" providing a link: "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/NzSdeS_K9". Below this, a video feed shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a black shirt. The browser then navigates to the RANDOM.ORG home page, which displays the text "Advisory: We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain." The user then uses a "List Randomizer" to shuffle a list of NBA teams, resulting in a new order starting with "1. NEW ORLEANS PELICANS" and "2. PHILADELPHIA 76ERS". Throughout the sequence, a red and white banner for "JASYP'S CASEBREAKS.COM" remains visible at the bottom.
